title: descurainia intermedia
intro: Descurainia intermedia, also known as tansy mustard or western tansy, is a perennial plant native to western North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and pungent, bitter taste. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Descurainia intermedia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infused oil, and can also be used as a topical poultice or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
